expectations.text: Checked recent git history for files related to the share modal
expectations.evidence: Transcript shows: 'git log --oneline --since="14d"' and found commits 0f096b6a (share flow hardening) and 7698d769 (Radix Select refactor)

expectations.text: Read the actual share modal component code before proposing a fix
expectations.evidence: Read ShareChatModal, ShareProjectSection, ProjectCollaborators, ui/select.tsx, ui/dialog.tsx, and 15+ related files before proposing the fix

expectations.text: Articulated a root cause statement before writing fix code
expectations.evidence: Has explicit 'Root Cause Statement' section with structured root cause / why it exists / blast radius before Phase 3 (Fix)

expectations.text: Proposed or wrote a regression test that would catch the bug
expectations.evidence: Wrote 4 regression tests including the critical 'email input accepts typed text after opening and closing role Select' test that directly reproduces the bug scenario

expectations.text: Performed a code review step (self-review of diff or mentioned spawning reviewer)
expectations.evidence: Phase 4: Review has 4 skeptic questions answered: root cause vs symptom, could it break, simpler fix, debugging artifacts

expectations.text: Mentioned running the full test suite to check for regressions
expectations.evidence: Phase 5 lists specific commands: 'bun test' and 'bun test tests/unit/pages/' and mentions manual browser verification
